branch_manifest.description: Dynamic SQL is assembled through a variable assignment before EXEC — INSERT INTO silver.ExecVariableTarget from bronze.Product

warnings.message: Write logic is executed via a SQL string stored in a variable before EXEC — the SQL is not statically visible at parse time and cannot be exercised by fixture-driven unit tests. LLM-recovered SQL is available in details.

details.recovered_sql: INSERT INTO silver.ExecVariableTarget (ProductAlternateKey, EnglishProductName) SELECT CAST(ProductID AS NVARCHAR(25)), ProductName FROM bronze.Product
